response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems thinking, but the absence of proven C++ in production routing systems and limited evidence of OS/distributed systems expertise for high-reliability tile pipelines raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world use cases
Demonstrated systems-level coding in DLang and low-latency applications
Strong track record of learning new stacks and contributing across full technical layers
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines
Lacks documented work on fault-tolerant distributed systems or real-time map update pipelines
Geospatial work is NGO-focused; no evidence of production-scale routing data systems
